overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a samurai character walking along a coastal mountain path at night. The character passes traditional stone lanterns and a campsite with NPCs, with autumn foliage and distant village lights visible in the atmospheric low-light setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside path with stone lanterns

events.description: character passes close to a lit stone lantern, briefly illuminating the armor

agents.ego_description: samurai character walking steadily along the narrow cliffside path, passing traditional stone lanterns

entered.detail: steep dark rock wall forming the left boundary of the path
traditional Japanese stone lantern with warm orange glow
dark ocean water visible beyond the cliff edge
tree with red autumn foliage silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The samurai walks along a narrow dirt trail hugging a rocky cliff face on the left, with the ocean visible to the right. Traditional stone lanterns provide warm pools of light against the cool night, and autumn trees with red foliage line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: campsite with fire and wooden cart

events.description: path opens to reveal a campsite with NPCs gathered around a fire
character slows slightly while passing the campsite area

agents.ego_description: samurai continues walking past a campsite where NPCs are gathered around a fire, maintaining steady pace

notable_agents.action: two figures standing near the campfire, one appears to be tending the fire

entered.detail: burning campfire with orange flames and glowing embers
traditional wooden cart with large wheels parked near the fire

segments.scene_description: The path widens to reveal a small campsite where NPCs gather around a crackling fire. A wooden cart stands nearby, and the firelight casts dynamic shadows across the scene. The samurai passes the camp while the rocky cliff recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain overlook with distant village view

events.description: trail opens to panoramic view of valley with distant village lights

agents.ego_description: samurai continues along the rocky path, moving toward the overlook with view of distant settlement lights

entered.detail: cluster of warm lights from buildings in the valley below
dark silhouetted mountains forming the horizon

segments.scene_description: The trail opens onto a wide rocky overlook with expansive views of a distant village nestled in the valley below. The campsite falls behind as the character moves toward the panoramic vista, with mountain ranges visible in the far distance and the coastline still visible to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal mountain path that transitions from a narrow, lantern-lit trail into an expansive panoramic overlook. It begins with the samurai walking a tight dirt path between a rocky cliff and the ocean, where warm light from traditional stone lanterns contrasts with the cool night and red autumn foliage. As the trail widens, the scene shifts toward a small campsite where NPCs gather around a crackling fire and a wooden cart, casting dynamic shadows as the cliff face recedes. The camera then follows the character away from the camp and onto a wide rocky plateau, opening the view to a distant village nestled in a valley. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal a vast vista of far-off mountain ranges and the continuing coastline under the night sky.
